name: MNCA
description: Voronoi + osc — CA solitons warp both coordinate systems
code:
// Voronoi + osc — CA solitons warp both coordinate systems
caStream('mnca_worm').out(o1)

voronoi(8, 0.012, 0.15)
  .modulate(src(o1), 0.06)
  .add(osc(5, 0.008, 0.4).rotate(()=>time*0.01)
    .modulate(src(o1), 0.04), 0.4)
  .color(0.35, 0.2, 0.55).brightness(0.03)
  .out(o2)

src(o0)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.025)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.35)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.4, 0.02), 0.003)
  .modulateRotate(noise(0.25, 0.015), 0.003)
  .hue(()=>0.003)
  .luma(0.005, 0.06)
  .brightness(0.022)
  .saturate(1.2)
  .contrast(1.02)
  .add(src(o1).mult(src(o2)), 0.1)
  .out(o0)
